name: nl_sponsor_signups_7d
definition: Signups or trial starts attributed to newsletter sponsor UTMs within 7 days of each send date.
target_hint: Strong niche fit (React/JS dev tool): 40–120 signups per $1.5k slot. Average fit: 15–40. Poor fit: <10 — kill and rewrite.

name: nl_sponsor_ctr
definition: Sponsor block clicks / estimated opens (from publisher report or clicks ÷ stated open rate × list size).
target_hint: ≥0.8% = healthy native creative. 0.5–0.8% = test hook B. <0.5% = audience or copy mismatch — pause rebook.

name: nl_sponsor_cpa_7d
definition: Total slot cost + production / attributed signups in 7d post-send.
target_hint: B2B dev SaaS: $50–150 CPA signup is strong; $150–300 acceptable for high-LTV. >$400 after 200+ clicks → kill rule fires.

name: nl_audience_overlap_score
definition: Weighted 1–5 score: job title match, stack match, geography, and stated open rate vs ICP.
target_hint: Only book ≥4/5 on first sprint; 3/5 only as cheap learning slot ($500–800).

name: nl_sponsor_activation_rate_14d
definition: % of newsletter-attributed signups completing core activation (first project, API call, or paid trial) within 14d.
target_hint: ≥25% for dev tools with tight message match; <15% → LP or onboarding mismatch, not newsletter fault alone.

name: nl_consecutive_slot_violations
definition: Count of newsletters booked >2 consecutive issues without skip.
target_hint: 0 is target; violation predicts CTR decay >40% on issue 3.
